creator: andrew@tao11.riddles.org.uk
text:
It looks like the environment variable used for specifying a proxy has changed, from HTTP_PROXY to http_proxy. This is an artifact of the switch from libfetch to libcurl, I guess.

(The lowercase name http_proxy works for fetch too, apparently, though it's kind of annoying to have environment vars in lower case.)

pkg -d update -f   will show more info about why it failed.
